# zones

**Instance Property**

The zones for the successful database operations.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute CloudKit.RecordZone[] zones;
```

## Discussion

The objects in the array have a single property with this format: `{zoneID: {zoneName: ‘zone’}}`.
title: zones
